content: Create a high-impact vertical mobile game advertisement poster in glossy anime action style, with a dramatic cyber-samurai fantasy aesthetic and dense, premium gacha-RPG promotional composition. The main scene shows 2 young adult male fighters in modern black business suits crouching aggressively in the foreground, each drawing a katana toward the viewer. Both have styled blond hair, sharp handsome features, white dress shirts, blue neckties, and intense action poses, with foreshortened hands and swords dominating the lower foreground. One sword has a blue ribbon tied near the hilt. Behind them, centered and towering, place 1 massive armored mecha samurai with ornate gold horns, layered metallic blue-black armor, glowing blue eyes, and a sheathed sword across its back, framed like a guardian deity. Use a vivid neon city and energy-burst backdrop in electric blue, violet, magenta, and gold, with light streaks, sparks, petals, slash effects, and ink-brush explosion textures. Add 1 vertical black brushstroke banner on the upper right with bold white Japanese text reading 「この刃で、未来を斬り拓け。」. Across the middle-lower area, place 1 huge gold Japanese calligraphy headline with thick brush texture and black shadow reading 「切り捨て御免」, spanning nearly the full width. In the lower left, embed 1 framed gameplay screenshot panel with a gold border, showing a night battle in front of a red Japanese temple courtyard, 1 playable swordsman in combat, multiple enemies, floating damage numbers including 5324, 5329, and 6132, a left-side virtual joystick, 5 character portraits total arranged vertically and along the bottom, 3 circular skill buttons on the right, and a top HUD showing a timer around 01:28 and WAVE 3/3. In the lower right, place 1 large black-and-white QR code inside a white square frame. Beneath and beside it, add bold Japanese text in white with blue outline reading 「今すぐダウンロード」. At the very bottom, include 2 official-style store badges: App Store on the left and Google Play on the right. Overall look: ultra-detailed, polished key art, dynamic perspective, metallic highlights, sharp cel-shaded anime rendering, premium mobile game marketing poster, intense action energy, cinematic lighting, and layered UI-heavy promotional layout.

content:
Create a bold Korean-style beverage advertisement poster with a warm golden splash background and dramatic commercial lighting. Show a {argument name="celebrity spokesperson" default="Donald Trump-like older male politician"} from the chest up, wearing a navy suit, white dress shirt, bright red tie, and a small American flag lapel pin, facing camera with a confident sales-pitch expression. His face is obscured by a flat rectangular censor block in a skin-toned color. In his left hand, extended close to the camera in forced perspective, he holds a yellow aluminum can of Korean rice punch drink labeled prominently in Korean, with red top and bottom bands and the main product text "비락 식혜" and "Since 1993" on the can. The can also includes smaller Korean copy, an image of sweet rice drink near the bottom, and the volume text "238 ml (120 kcal)". His right hand gives a thumbs-up.

Use an energetic retro-commercial composition, with splashing sweet rice beverage and droplets behind him, glowing golden highlights, and a slightly low-angle heroic framing. At the top, include 3 distinct headline text groups: a small handwritten-style black slogan on the upper left reading "전통의 맛, 한국의 DRINK!", a huge central headline in distressed bold Korean type reading "걸죽는 땐?" in dark brown-black and "비락 식혜!" in vivid red, and a brand logo on the upper right reading "비락" with small red text "Since 1993" beneath it. Add 2 callout badges: on the left, a yellow circular seal with a tiny crown icon and the text "대한민국 국민음료 No.1"; on the right, a white speech bubble with handwritten Korean text "한국이 만든 맛있는 전통!" and red English text "I LOVE IT!".

At the bottom foreground, place 2 food elements: a brass bowl filled with sweet rice drink and floating rice grains on the left, and a wooden bowl piled with white rice on the right. Across the lower middle, add 2 lines of large brush-style promotional text, the first in white reading "달콤하게! 시원하게!" and the second in mixed white and yellow reading "속까지 시~원하게!" with an energetic yellow underline stroke. Along the very bottom, include 3 circular feature icons with captions in Korean: "국내산 쌀 엄선된 재료", "시원하게 갈증해소", and "부드러운 단맛 속 편한 식혜". In the lower right corner, add tiny disclaimer text "연출된 이미지입니다". Make the overall look glossy, exaggerated, funny, and convincing like a viral parody print ad.
title: Korean Rice Drink Parody Ad Poster
description: This prompt generates a humorous, high-impact parody beverage advertisement poster featuring a famous politician-like spokesperson promoting a Korean canned rice drink.

content: A bold Korean beverage advertisement poster in a glossy commercial photography style, featuring {argument name="spokesperson" default="Donald Trump lookalike"} in a dark navy business suit, white dress shirt, and vivid blue tie, standing front-facing against a saturated bright-blue sky with a few soft white clouds and a faint modern city skyline including a tall skyscraper resembling the Empire State Building on the right. He is holding a cold plastic bottle of {argument name="product name" default="POCARI SWEAT"} dramatically toward the camera in his left hand, with extreme foreshortening so the bottle appears large in the foreground and the person is slightly behind it. The bottle is clear with condensation, a white cap, visible water inside, and a deep blue label reading “POCARI SWEAT” in large white letters with smaller text above saying “ION SUPPLY DRINK.” Add energetic frozen water splashes and droplets around the bottle, hand, and lower foreground to emphasize freshness and hydration. Place the brand logo in the upper left corner: “POCARI SWEAT” in white with the curved underline mark. Across the top, add huge distressed white Korean headline text, slightly angled and filling most of the upper half: {argument name="headline text" default="갈증 해소? 이걸로 끝! 포카리스웨트!"}. In the lower right over the suit, add a bold italic quotation in white and blue Korean text: {argument name="quote" default="WINNING은 수분 싸움! 포카리스웨트로 리프레시!"}. In the bottom left, include exactly 3 circular benefit icons stacked vertically with short Korean labels: a water drop icon with “수분 보충”, a lightning bolt icon with “전해질 보충”, and a running figure icon with “빠른 흡수”. Use a high-contrast, patriotic blue-and-white color palette, dramatic ad lighting, sharp focus on the bottle and hand, slightly softer focus on the face and background, and an overall energetic premium campaign-poster look.

content: A hyper-detailed Japanese parody theme park advertisement poster in a vertical format, designed like a dramatic summer travel ad mixed with a luxury attraction campaign. The setting is a tropical jungle under a vivid blue sky with scattered clouds and a bright blazing sun in the upper right corner, with palm leaves framing the top edges. Across the top, place a huge 3D stone-textured Japanese headline reading {argument name="headline text" default="ジャンキリア沖縄"}, with a smaller white Japanese tagline underneath that reads "— やんばるの大自然に包まれた、超本格ジャングル・テーマパーク —". In the center, feature a large modern smartphone standing upright and slightly tilted, dominating the composition. On its screen, show a beige ticket-lottery waiting interface with jungle silhouettes at the top and large bold Japanese text reading "整理券抽選中", a circular loading indicator, and smaller text near the bottom reading "結果発表まで30分" and "※この画面を閉じずにお待ちください". The phone status bar should show 10:00. Behind the phone on the left, place a roaring Tyrannosaurus rex emerging from jungle foliage, mouth open wide, realistic and threatening. On the right, place an ornate golden entrance gate with detailed carvings and a sign reading "プレミアムパス入口", leading to a red-carpeted premium entry lane. In the foreground and midground, show a long crowded queue of park visitors stretching deep into the scene, all wearing casual summer clothing, hats, towels, backpacks, and carrying umbrellas, fans, and water bottles, suggesting extreme heat and exhaustion. Several people nearest the viewer should have blurred faces. On the far left, add a giant weathered stone sign with huge red Japanese text reading "待ち時間 180分". At the lower left, include 3 stacked rustic wooden signboards: the top sign has a blue parking icon and text "駐車場 2,000円"; the middle sign has a smartphone icon and text "アプリ必須 ダウンロードしてね!"; the bottom sign has a dinosaur silhouette and text "当選者だけが冒険へ". Along the lower right side, place very large vertical white brush-style Japanese copy reading "待つこと、それが冒険だ。". Near the bottom right, include 3 small circular icon callouts with short Japanese promotional lines: "抽選に選ばれし者だけが、恐竜に会える。", "スマホの充電が尽きる前に、夢は始まる。", and "プレミアムな近道も、ご用意しました。" with icons suggesting dinosaur, phone battery, and VIP access. At the very bottom center, add a black disclaimer strip with small white Japanese text reading "このポスターは架空のパロディ広告です". The overall style should be ultra-realistic, cinematic, high-contrast, satirical, and polished like a premium commercial poster, with exaggerated theme park hype, oppressive heat, and absurd queue-based adventure as the core joke.

content: A polished promotional mockup showing 3 tall smartphone screens displayed side by side in a vertical triptych layout, each presenting a modern beauty brand landing page for a lip product. The overall composition is editorial, minimal, and premium, designed like a social media showcase of mobile web designs. The left panel sits on a soft lavender-to-blush gradient background and shows a black-framed phone with a cream and blush beauty website for {argument name="brand name" default="Kosas"}. At the top of this panel, small elegant serif text reads {argument name="left headline" default="Fresh Pout."}. The phone screen features a cropped close-up beauty image at the top, a bold headline reading “Lips in their fullest expression.” with “fullest” in italic serif styling, a rounded dark call-to-action button, a strip of 3 lip close-up thumbnails, 3 labeled benefit tabs reading “Plumps,” “Tingles,” and “Shines,” and a row of 5 shade or effect icons underneath. The middle panel sits on a lavender-to-deep-violet gradient background and shows a second black-framed phone with a more typographic landing page. Above it, serif text reads {argument name="middle headline" default="Claude Code"}. The screen includes a cropped portrait image at top, a very large bold black stacked title reading “LIP PULSE.” with a pink italic script-style line “is here.” beneath it, a rounded dark button, a dark section with the phrase “Lips in their fullest expression.”, and a product grid near the bottom containing 6 shade cards arranged in 2 rows of 3. The right panel sits on a dark navy textured background and shows a third black-framed phone with a pink-forward e-commerce style page. Centered above it, monospaced white text reads {argument name="right headline" default="GPT Images 2.0"}. This screen prominently displays the product hero section with the brand name “Kosas,” a large title “The Lip Pulse,” a pink lip gloss tube angled to the right, small feature icons, a shade strip of 6 lip swatches near the middle, and a lower promotional block with additional pink product imagery. Keep the layout symmetrical with exactly 3 phones, one per panel, each fully visible and vertically oriented. Use high-end cosmetic campaign aesthetics, clean spacing, fashion-web typography mixing serif and bold sans serif, soft pink and cream UI palettes, subtle shadows, and a sleek product-design presentation suitable for showcasing AI-generated mobile website concepts.

The two-page spread contains 2 full-page portraits of the same elegant woman with her face obscured by a soft square blur, creating a privacy-censored look. On the left page, she stands against a pale stone or concrete architectural wall wearing a structured long-sleeve dress in {argument name="dress color" default="soft slate gray"}, with a fitted bodice, round neckline, sharply tailored seams, and an exaggerated sculptural bell-shaped skirt; the camera angle is slightly low, making her neck appear long and her posture statuesque. On the right page, she is photographed from the back in a dramatic {argument name="second dress color" default="black"} evening gown with a very deep open back, wide shoulder straps, and a voluminous full skirt, standing in front of a classic paneled wall or door in a dim, moody interior. Use luxury fashion magazine styling, minimal composition, muted tones, soft natural-looking light, refined shadows, realistic paper texture, visible book gutter, slightly curved pages, and crisp print detail. content: A slightly surreal but photorealistic portrait of a seated person in a quiet courtyard or patio, centered in frame, wearing a fitted white long-sleeve turtleneck top with delicate pink floral prints and a printed illustration of a girl on the chest, paired with loose cream floral pants. The person sits on a simple white metal chair and holds a small fluffy poodle-like dog in their lap; the dog has curly off-white fur and distinctly dyed orange ears. Perched on top of the person’s dark hair bun is a black crow or raven, facing left, calm and balanced as if it naturally belongs there. The subject’s pose is still, direct, and formal, creating an odd deadpan family-portrait feeling. Set the scene against a textured off-white stucco wall with exactly 4 notable decorative background elements: 1 brown sun-shaped wall ornament in the upper left, 1 small wall-mounted planter shelf with a small bird figurine and trailing flowers on the left, 1 tall arched window or mural on the right showing a bright blue sky with soft white clouds, and 1 white pedestal planter at lower right filled with long green leaves and exactly 2 pink flamingo ornaments. Include a bit of stone edging and dark greenery at lower left and a brown tiled floor. Lighting is soft natural daylight, slightly overcast, with muted colors, shallow depth of field, and a vintage editorial photography look. Composition should be vertical, full seated figure, straight-on, balanced, and quietly uncanny. Customize the main figure as {argument name="person" default="a middle-aged woman"}, the bird as {argument name="bird type" default="black crow"}, the dog breed as {argument name="dog type" default="small poodle mix"}, the dog ear color as {argument name="dog ear color" default="orange"}, and the outfit palette as {argument name="outfit colors" default="white and faded pink florals"}.
title: Surreal Patio Portrait with Crow and Dog

content: A dramatic full-body photo of a woman dancing powerfully in a dark upscale lounge or bar, wearing a sleek black evening dress with a high slit and flowing velvet-like fabric that whips outward with her movement. She has long straight {argument name="hair color" default="black"} hair flying to one side, a slim athletic figure, and small hoop earrings. Capture her in a confident, stylish dance pose with one arm raised gracefully above her head and the other curved downward, torso turned in profile, emphasizing elegance and motion. The setting is dim and cinematic with warm amber practical lights, soft bokeh, and a blurred audience in the background, including a few seated onlookers and a glowing television screen off to the left. The mood is cool, sensual, and high-end, with strong contrast, shallow depth of field, realistic skin, subtle motion in the dress hem, and fashion-editorial lighting. Photorealistic, dynamic nightlife photography, vertical composition.
title: Woman Dancing in Black Dress
description: This prompt generates a cinematic photorealistic nightlife portrait of a woman in a flowing black dress dancing elegantly in a dim lounge, ideal for fashion, performance, or social media visuals.

content: Using the provided reference image of the mobile app screen, transform it into a premium editorial magazine cover mockup about agricultural innovation. Keep the app UI recognizable on the phone display, but place it in a realistic lifestyle context: a vineyard worker in the foreground holding a smartphone that shows the app, with vineyard rows, mountains, and a few workers in the background under natural daylight. Design the full page as a Spanish-language magazine cover with a refined agricultural-business aesthetic in green, cream, and earthy tones. Add a large masthead at the top reading “REVISTA CAMPO FUTURO”, a thin top strapline with 3 items separated by vertical bars: “Especial Viñas de Chile”, “Innovación agrícola”, and “Abril 2026”, plus a subtitle line beneath the masthead: “Agricultura, innovación y gestión rural”. On the left, add a green section tag reading “TECNOLOGÍA AGRÍCOLA” and a bold stacked main cover headline: “La app con IA que está revolucionando el campo”, followed by a short deck about Kimün replacing the traditional notebook and giving real-time control to vineyards and agricultural businesses. Add a circular callout badge mentioning a special feature about Kimün as an intelligent field notebook with AI. Include 2 bottom teaser photos: one close-up of the worker holding the phone in the vineyard with page label “p.18” and a caption about field diagnosis and cellphone alerts, and one small group scene with 3 people reviewing the app together with page label “p.24” and a caption about connected field teams, voice, records, and instant costs. On the right column, add 3 article teasers with icons and page numbers: one about the end of paper and the new era of the intelligent field notebook (p.30), one about more efficient vineyards through better data-driven decisions (p.36), and one about water management 4.0 and smarter, more profitable irrigation (p.42). Add a footer strip with 5 category labels: “AGRICULTURA”, “FRUTALES”, “VIÑAS”, “GANADERÍA”, “SUSTENTABILIDAD”, plus a barcode and a small price. Make it look like a polished real magazine cover photo shoot and editorial layout, not a flat app screenshot.

content: Create a glossy, hyper-saturated social media ad poster for a futuristic beauty product launch, designed like a Canva marketing graphic. The composition is a single widescreen promotional banner centered on a cyan-to-purple gradient background, with rounded corners and a vivid neon pink color palette. Inside the banner, show a young woman from the chest up in a glowing sci-fi tunnel made of concentric pink and white light rings. Her face is obscured by a soft square blur block, but her hair is styled in two small buns, and she wears hoop earrings, layered chain necklaces, a metallic silver top, and an iridescent pink holographic jacket. She extends one hand toward the camera holding a clear lip balm tube close to the lens, creating strong foreground perspective. The tube label reads “GLOW MODE Lip Balm.” At the top center, large neon headline text reads “GLOW MODE” with a script subtitle “Lip Balm,” and below it a smaller line reads “JUICY SHINE. HYDRATING CARE. ZERO STICKINESS.” In the upper left corner, add a handwritten neon note reading “NEW!” In the upper right corner, place an orange rounded sticker with white text reading “gpt-image-2,” plus a small orange pointer tab beneath it. On the right side of the banner, include 2 circular callout badges: a pink starburst badge that says “ONLY $14.99” and a black glowing circular badge that says “VIRAL ON TikTok 2M+ views.” At the lower right, show 2 product display elements: one upright open lip balm tube with wand applicator beside it, and one whole sliced peach plus one cut mango half with green leaves, all sitting on a glossy reflective surface with pink light swirls. Along the lower center, add 3 feature icons with labels: a droplet icon labeled “HYALURONIC HYDRATION,” a fruit icon labeled “PEACH MANGO SCENT,” and a bunny icon labeled “100% VEGAN & CRUELTY-FREE.” In the lower left inside the banner, add a vertical stack of 3 social buttons with platform icons and handles: TikTok with “#GlowMode,” Instagram with “@LunaBeatty,” and Snapchat with “@LunaGlow.” Beneath them place 1 glowing QR code card, and next to it handwritten script text reading “Shop Now!” with an arrow pointing toward the QR code. Outside the banner at the bottom left, place a tilted teal rounded label reading “Canva AI,” with a small teal paper-plane style accent nearby. Add glossy reflections, lens flares, bloom, neon rim lighting, sparkles, and polished ad-design styling throughout, with crisp commercial product photography mixed with futuristic graphic design.

content: A dramatic Japanese food advertisement poster for a premium pork rice bowl, vertical composition, black and fiery orange background with glowing embers, smoke, and a high-contrast gourmet marketing look. The main focus is an oversized bowl of butadon in the lower center, filled with white rice and topped with many thick slices of glossy grilled pork belly, richly lacquered with dark sweet soy glaze, visible char marks, caramelized edges, and a stream of sauce pouring down from above onto the meat. Make the food look hyper-appetizing, juicy, rich, and slightly exaggerated like a restaurant flyer. Large bold brushed gold Japanese headline text dominates the upper left: {argument name="headline text" default="帯広の肉厚豚丼"}. Across the middle, a gold paint-stroke banner contains black Japanese text: {argument name="subheadline text" default="極上の炭火焼き。極上のタレ。"}. On the right side, add a cute anime girl mascot standing behind the bowl, about half-body visible, wearing a black-and-white cow-themed hoodie with small horns, long blonde hair, frilly sleeves, and a shy delighted pose with one hand near her mouth; keep her face intentionally obscured by a plain beige rectangle censor block. Add vertical white Japanese copy along the right edge in 2 separate text groups: 1 at the upper right, 1 larger at the mid-to-lower right. Add a small handwritten-style white note near the girl with a tiny heart. In the lower left, include a dark circular callout badge with gold rim and white/yellow Japanese text about charcoal grilling and flavor. Along the very bottom, place 3 circular ingredient-feature icons with exact labels beneath them: raw pork slices labeled {argument name="feature label 1" default="肉厚!"}, glowing charcoal embers labeled {argument name="feature label 2" default="炭火焼き!"}, and glossy dark sauce labeled {argument name="feature label 3" default="極上ダレ!"}. At the bottom right, add a huge energetic gold brush-calligraphy slogan with splattered paint effects, plus a smaller white sentence beneath it. Use intense lighting, glossy highlights, premium yakiniku flyer aesthetics, dense Japanese typography, bold brush fonts, and a mouthwatering late-night food terror vibe.

content: A refined Chinese ink-painting style portrait on aged parchment, composed like a classical literati hanging scroll with muted sepia, tan, charcoal, and faded indigo tones. In the center stands a scholarly male figure in flowing dark blue-black Hanfu robes with intricate gold-patterned trim and wide cream inner sleeves, posed front-facing with a dignified stance. His face is intentionally obscured by a rectangular blurred block, while his hair is dark, wavy, and neatly styled. He holds a stitched traditional-style book against his chest with a vertical cover inscription that includes the large Latin letters "XAI" and 4 Chinese text columns beneath it. His other hand rests on an ornate armillary sphere set on a carved pedestal at the lower left. Behind him is a monumental shanshui landscape of 1 mountain range, layered mist, rocky peaks, and drifting clouds, rendered with fine brushwork in an old master style. In the upper right sky area, place 1 bold modern "XAI" logo with the stylized emblem above the letters, and to the far right include 1 slender rocket launching upward beside a launch tower, with smoke billowing into the clouds, blending futuristic aerospace imagery into the classical scene. On the upper left, add 1 vertical column group of Chinese calligraphy title text in black ink, plus 1 smaller vertical signature line and 2 red seal stamps beneath it. The overall effect should fuse ancient Chinese scholar portraiture with space-age technology and AI symbolism, highly detailed, elegant, balanced, and slightly satirical, with the texture of antique paper and the composition of a museum-quality scroll painting.
title: Classical Chinese Scholar with XAI Motif
description: This prompt generates a faux-ancient Chinese scroll painting that blends a robed scholar portrait with XAI branding, a rocket launch, and scholarly scientific symbolism.

content:
A refined sepia-toned illustration in the style of an ancient Chinese scholarly portrait fused with modern AI branding, on aged parchment paper with visible grain and ink-wash texture. Centered is a half-body portrait of a curly-haired male scholar inspired by Democritus, seated behind a wooden desk and wearing layered traditional robes in muted blue-gray and brown with intricate trim. His face is intentionally obscured by a flat rectangular block in a brown skin-tone color, creating an anonymized or redacted look. He holds 1 calligraphy brush upright in his right hand, while his left hand rests on the table. In the upper center-right, place the Claude logo with a rust-orange sunburst emblem and the word “Claude” in dark serif lettering. On the upper left, add a large vertical title in Chinese, “德米斯圖”, with 1 vertical column of smaller Chinese calligraphy text beside it reading: “以語言為媒，理解為舟，助人洞見，推動協作，造福人類，安全可信，通往更美好的未來。” Add a smaller vertical signature line on the far left reading “甲辰春寫” with 2 red seal stamps below it. The background shows a classical Chinese landscape painting with distant mountains, a small pavilion on a cliff, mist, and dense bamboo leaves framing the upper right and right edge, plus dark pine branches on the lower left.

The wooden desk fills the lower third and contains exactly 8 distinct object groups: 1 brush pot holding 4 brushes on the left, 1 stack of 4 stitched books with Chinese titles on the spines reading “人工智慧概論”, “機器學習原理”, “負責任的 AI”, and “對齊與價值觀”, 1 ink stone or ink dish near the center-left, 1 central parchment diagram sheet, 1 small dark cube seal near the bottom left with Chinese characters on two visible faces, 1 framed placard on the right, 1 rolled scroll at the bottom right, and 1 tabletop surface with visible wood grain. The central parchment diagram should show a circular node labeled “AI 安全 Safety” connected to 6 surrounding nodes labeled “準確”, “可靠”, “有益”, “透明”, “對齊”, and “隱私”, with delicate cloud motifs around the diagram. The framed placard on the right should read “AI 安全原則” as a header and list 4 bullet points in Chinese: “減少災難性風險”, “尊重人類價值觀”, “確保系統可控”, and “促進長遠福祉”. The rolled scroll at the bottom right should display the phrase “以謹慎之心 創造未來”.

Use a balanced composition, scholarly calm mood, highly detailed ink linework, subtle watercolor shading, antique museum-print aesthetics, and a restrained palette of parchment tan, ink brown, faded blue, and muted charcoal. The overall feeling should be an intellectual tribute poster blending classical East Asian literati painting, philosophical portraiture, and contemporary AI safety themes.

content: A sepia-toned ancient Chinese scroll painting reimagined as a visionary propaganda-style scene. In the center stands a scholarly robed figure styled like an imperial sage or philosopher, wearing flowing blue-gray hanfu with ornate trim, addressing a crowd of exactly 8 followers seen mostly from behind in the foreground. The sage’s face is intentionally obscured by a plain rectangular blur, and 3 members of the crowd also have blurred rectangular faces. The central figure raises one hand in a teaching gesture and holds a glowing geometric polyhedron crystal in the other hand. Behind him is a monumental hanging banner or framed plaque displaying the Google DeepMind logo and the words “Google DeepMind.” The background is a richly detailed traditional shanshui landscape with layered mountains, mist, trees, rocky formations, and a pagoda temple on the right. Along the upper right side, include vertical Chinese calligraphy text headed by “德米斯願景圖,” followed by several elegant columns of classical-style writing, plus a smaller vertical signature line and 2 red seal stamps. Use aged paper texture, muted brown ink, faded mineral pigments, fine linework, and the composition of a historic Chinese hanging scroll or literati painting, but with subtle anachronistic modern-AI symbolism. The overall mood is solemn, mythic, intellectual, and satirical, blending traditional East Asian art with corporate AI iconography.

Add 5 text elements in Japanese: a blue circular badge at the upper left reading "初夏のおすすめ", a large bold brush-calligraphy headline across the top in 2 lines reading "とり天" and "ざるうどん", a small red vertical seal near the headline reading "自慢のとり天", a tall translucent blue vertical copy block at the upper right reading "ひんやり、つるり。さっぱり、満たされる。", and a price block at the lower right reading "980円 税込" with a blue brushstroke banner below that says "大盛り無料！". Add a short 4-line Japanese body copy paragraph at the lower left describing the dish in a menu-poster style. Preserve the original meal arrangement and realistic photography, but enhance it slightly for advertising: brighter, more appetizing, crisp, and high contrast. Make the overall design look like a polished restaurant poster created from a casual food photo.
title: Turn Food Photo Into Japanese Poster
description: This prompt converts a reference meal photo into a polished Japanese restaurant advertisement poster, useful for menu promos and social media food marketing.

content: A luxurious tourism poster for {argument name="destination" default="Malaysia"}, designed as a vertical fine-art travel advertisement on a clean ivory-white textured background with subtle embossed ornamental patterns. The composition is built around one long flowing red-and-gold batik silk ribbon that sweeps diagonally and spirals through the page, forming an elegant S-curve and visually containing a dreamlike collage of landmarks, culture, and nature. At the top left, warm golden sunrise light pours over misty tropical mountains and rainforest with a waterfall, dense palms, and a large rhinoceros hornbill perched beside hibiscus flowers and white tropical blossoms. In the upper center, a detailed Kuala Lumpur skyline rises from mist, dominated by the Petronas Twin Towers, with the KL Tower and several modern skyscrapers visible. Near the upper right floats 1 colorful traditional wau kite with floral patterns against open white space. In the middle left, include 1 grand mosque with multiple domes and minarets set among palms and haze. In the middle center-right, include the historic Sultan Abdul Samad Building with its copper domes and clocktower. In the lower middle left, include 1 elevated red-and-silver urban train crossing through the city. In the lower center, show 1 ornate Chinatown gate labeled Jalan Petaling, decorated with red lanterns and bustling pedestrians. In the lower right-middle, depict the Batu Caves area with 1 towering golden Murugan statue and 1 steep rainbow staircase climbing into limestone cliffs, surrounded by crowds. At the lower right, nestle 1 landscaped city park with a turquoise lake and fountains. Purple orchids and tropical flowers are woven into the ribbon and foreground in several places. At the very bottom right, show 1 small traditional dancer in red and gold attire twirling the trailing end of the ribbon. The collage should feel luminous, hyper-detailed, majestic, and celebratory, blending photorealistic architecture with painterly fantasy travel-poster styling, soft clouds, atmospheric haze, and glowing highlights. Add elegant poster typography in the lower left: the main headline reads {argument name="headline text" default="VISIT MALAYSIA 2026"}, a smaller location line reads {argument name="location text" default="KUALA LUMPUR"}, a blue script tourism slogan reads {argument name="tagline" default="Malaysia Truly Asia"}, and below that a small refined subheading reads {argument name="subheading" default="Where Diversity Converges\nKuala Lumpur, City of Wonders\nThe Heart of Asia"}. Use a premium color palette of gold, crimson, ivory, emerald, sky blue, and tropical greens, with polished editorial composition and high-end destination-branding aesthetics.
title: Visit Malaysia 2026 Travel Poster
description: A premium vertical tourism poster showcasing Malaysia’s landmarks, culture, and tropical beauty, ideal for destination marketing and campaign visuals.

content: A hyper-detailed French popular science magazine cover in the style of a bold mainstream newsstand publication, full-page vertical layout, dramatic glossy print design, black background with intense neon lighting and saturated red, blue, purple, green, and orange highlights. At the very top, a wide red masthead bar with the magazine title {argument name="magazine title" default="SCIENCE & VIE"} in huge white serif capital letters with subtle beveling and metallic shine; small issue details on the upper right in tiny white text. On the upper left, a bright yellow and black special tag reading {argument name="special tag" default="SPÉCIAL PHOTONIQUE"} with a red arrow motif. The main headline dominates most of the upper half in gigantic white block capitals with a red glow and slight 3D shadow: {argument name="main headline" default="LA PHOTONIQUE RÉVOLUTIONNE TOUT !"}. Beneath it, 3 short cover lines in smaller white text with selected words highlighted in yellow, discussing ultrafast light-speed chips, a French record computer called Lucy, and light trapped for millions of cycles for energy-efficient AI. Centerpiece image: a futuristic square photonic processor chip floating in space at a slight perspective tilt, extremely detailed circuitry, metallic screws at the corners, glowing traces, and a bright cyan-blue core display labeled {argument name="chip name" default="Lucy"}; the chip emits intersecting beams and flowing fiber-optic light trails in electric blue, magenta, orange, and violet that radiate outward across the page. Background behind the chip shows 2 luminous server-wall corridors, red on the left and green on the right, fading into darkness, suggesting a high-tech datacenter. At the bottom, the curved horizon of Earth from space with a soft blue atmospheric glow and scattered city lights. Add 4 side callout boxes total: 2 stacked on the left and 2 stacked on the right, each with yellow headers and white body text, using a magazine cover typography hierarchy. Left box 1 header: "EXCLUSIF", featuring Lucy as the most powerful French photonic quantum computer in the world, with several short bullet lines and a yellow emphasis on "12 qubits". Left box 2 header: "RECORD MONDIAL", about light trapped for millions of cycles in a chip, with yellow emphasis on "millions de cycles". Right box 1 header area in yellow, with a bold red percentage "+300 %" and text about the French gem Soitec rising thanks to photonic AI and saving datacenters during the energy crisis. Right box 2 header: "ENQUÊTE", about the end of power-hungry GPUs, with yellow-highlighted numeric claims such as 100 times cheaper and 1,000 times faster. Near the lower center, tiny white image-credit text. A thick black bottom banner spans the page with a red square containing a white plus symbol on the left, and a large dossier teaser in white and red text: {argument name="bottom feature text" default="DOSSIER COMPLET Photonique & IA : les 10 avancées qui vont transformer votre quotidien"}. Along the very bottom, add 3 small circular red icon blurbs with short white captions about seismic optical fibers, a new generation of LiDAR and AR, and European sovereignty in progress. Lower right corner includes a white barcode box and a short block of white text about the issue being on sale. Overall look: sensational, prestigious, futuristic, glossy, information-dense, sharp editorial typography, dramatic science-news cover, cinematic lighting, high contrast, photorealistic 3D chip illustration mixed with premium magazine graphic design.
title: Futuristic Photonics Magazine Cover
description: This prompt generates a dramatic French-style science magazine cover centered on a glowing photonic chip, ideal for editorial mockups, tech news covers, and speculative science publication designs.

content: Create a dramatic vertical food advertisement on a pure black background, styled like a premium ingredient breakdown poster for a hearty Chinese chicken mushroom vermicelli stew. Use a clean top-to-bottom exploded composition with floating ingredients suspended in midair above the finished dish, each group clearly separated and lit with glossy commercial food-photography lighting. At the top, show a cluster of mixed brown shiitake and other savory mushrooms. Below that, show 2 grouped aromatics: a pile of red goji berries and a small bundle of green scallions with 2 thick ginger slices. Below that, show 2 grouped main items: several raw chopped bone-in chicken pieces with skin on, and 1 bundled nest of dry vermicelli noodles. Below that, show 2 grouped vegetables: peeled potato cubes and thick carrot slices. Beneath them, place 1 transparent glass bowl filled with rich golden chicken broth, with 4 shiitake mushrooms visible on the surface, tiny herb bits, a few floating oil droplets, and faint steam. At the bottom, place 1 dark brown ceramic casserole pot with side handles containing the finished stew: chicken pieces, shiitake mushrooms, translucent vermicelli, potato chunks, carrot slices, scattered goji berries, chopped green onion garnish, and glossy golden broth. Add drifting droplets, crumbs, and tiny garnish particles between layers to emphasize motion and richness. Include subtle steam rising from the final stew and 1 bright star-like sparkle highlight on the right rim of the casserole. Surround the ingredient groups with 7 bilingual callouts in Chinese and English, each with a thin curved arrow pointing to the relevant item. The 7 labels are: "榛蘑&香菇 / Hazel Mushrooms & Shiitake", "鲜美菌菇 / Savory Mushrooms", "枸杞&葱姜 / Goji Berries & Aromatics", "鸡肉&粉条 / Chicken & Vermicelli", "土豆&胡萝卜 / Potatoes & Carrots", "浓郁鸡汤 / Rich Chicken Broth", and "成品 / Finished Stew". Add 1 extra bilingual text note near the vegetables or middle area reading "丰富食材 / Rich Ingredients". Make the image hyper-realistic, appetizing, high contrast, razor sharp, with cinematic highlights, deep shadows, premium packaging-ad aesthetics, and a balanced centered layout optimized for a poster or social media ad.
title: Exploded Chicken Mushroom Stew Ad
description: A high-contrast vertical food poster showing an exploded ingredient layout and bilingual labels for a rich chicken, mushroom, potato, carrot, and vermicelli stew.

content:
Create a dramatic Japanese mobile game advertisement poster for a zombie survival RPG in anime-meets-cinematic style. Vertical smartphone poster layout, dense promotional design, gritty urban apocalypse background at dusk with ruined city streets, smoke, sparks, debris, damaged buildings, neon signs, and a crowd of zombies advancing from behind. In the center, a young anime woman sits on the ground in a slightly slouched pose, legs bent, holding a black handgun upright in one hand. She has straight dark brown to black shoulder-length hair, pale skin, and an oversized dirty white T-shirt splattered with blood. Large bold Japanese calligraphy is printed vertically on the shirt: "働きたくね〜". Her expression area is simple and unobtrusive so the composition emphasizes the shirt, weapon, and mood. Surround her with multiple zombies in torn clothing, reaching forward from the left and right background.

Use an aggressive game key-art design with 8 clearly separated promotional sections. Section 1: top-left game logo block, count 3 text elements, with large distressed English title "Dead or work", smaller Japanese subtitle "ゾンビサバイバルRPG", and heavy black paint-splatter background with white and red text. Section 2: right-side vertical slogan area, count 2 text elements, with white Japanese text "動かない、ただ" above giant red vertical text "生き残れ。" on a rough black brushstroke strip. Section 3: left-middle feature list panel, count 4 feature rows, each row with a white icon in a black square and yellow/white Japanese copy; labels are "ゾンビを倒して生き延びろ", "拠点を強化・カスタマイズ", "仲間と協力プレイ", and "デイリーミッションで報酬GET". Section 4: right-middle bonus campaign panel, count 1 headline plus 3 reward items; headline in a bright jagged yellow burst says "今すぐ始めると 豪華特典プレゼント!" and beneath it are three item boxes labeled "ゴールド ×5000", "レア武器 (7日間)", and "サバイバルキット ×10". Section 5: lower-middle gameplay screenshot strip, count 4 thumbnails with captions; captions are "リアルタイムバトル!", "基地を自由にカスタム!", "仲間とレイドボスに挑め!", and "広大なオープンワールド!". Section 6: bottom call-to-action banner, count 2 text elements, with a huge yellow-and-red Japanese phrase "今すぐダウンロード!" and smaller white/red subtext "あなたの選択が、生死を分ける。". Section 7: bottom-right store badges, count 2 badges, showing App Store and Google Play style download buttons. Section 8: bottom-right QR area, count 1 QR code in a white square.

Overall aesthetic: hyper-detailed, high-contrast, grimy, intense, commercially polished gacha/mobile game ad, combining anime character art with realistic zombie horror background. Use bold distressed typography, black brush textures, red warning colors, yellow promotional highlights, metallic UI framing, and cinematic orange-gray lighting.

content: A whimsical, photorealistic product-style food photograph of 8 ice cream cones lined up in a straight row on a matte black rectangular stand, each scoop designed to look like a different planet of the solar system. The scene is shot at eye level with a shallow depth of field and creamy urban bokeh in the background, suggesting an outdoor city street or café setting in soft daylight. From left to right, show exactly 8 cones: a gray speckled Mercury scoop, a yellow-brown swirling Venus scoop, a blue-and-green Earth scoop with white cloud patterns and a small blue drip, a deep red Mars scoop with darker marbling and red melted drips, a striped Jupiter scoop with its Great Red Spot visible, a pale tan Saturn scoop with a thin ring encircling it, a light icy blue Uranus scoop with a blue drip, and a vivid cobalt-blue Neptune scoop with glossy texture and blue dripping melt. Use crisp waffle cones, realistic melting details, glossy frozen surfaces, careful studio-quality lighting, and a centered symmetrical composition. Keep the planets highly recognizable but rendered as believable ice cream, with the black stand spanning the width of the frame and the background softly blurred.
